SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Protecting Louisville Homes, One Gutter at a Time

RainDogs Gutters started with a simple mission: to provide Louisville homeowners with reliable gutter solutions that stand up to Kentucky's unpredictable weather. We're a local team, born and raised right here, and we understand the unique challenges our climate and housing styles present.

Our approach is straightforward: honest assessments, quality materials, and meticulous workmanship. We don't cut corners, and we stand behind every job we do. We believe in clear communication and ensuring you understand exactly what your home needs to stay protected.

We're proud to be a part of the Louisville community. From Old Louisville's historic homes to the newer developments in the east end, we're committed to keeping our neighborhoods safe and dry. We actively support local initiatives and believe in giving back to the city that's given us so much.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Why Choose RainDogs Gutters

Local Expertise

We understand Louisville's unique climate and housing needs.

Quality Materials

Durable gutters built to last, even through the toughest storms.

Expert Installation

Precise installation for optimal performance and water diversion.

Reliable Service

Prompt, professional service you can count on, every time.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

RainDogs Gutters did an amazing job cleaning my gutters. They were completely clogged with leaves and debris, and now they're flowing perfectly. The team was professional, efficient, and left my property spotless. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Gutter Cleaning
“

I had a leak in my gutter after a bad storm. RainDogs Gutters came out quickly and repaired the damaged section. They were honest and upfront about the cost, and the repair seems solid. Good service!

John B. Gutter Repair
“

I'm so glad I had RainDogs Gutters install gutter guards. I haven't had to clean my gutters once since they were installed! The team was professional and efficient, and the guards look great. Definitely worth the investment.

Emily K. Gutter Guard Installation
“

Excellent experience with RainDogs Gutters! They installed new gutters on my house in St. Matthews, and they look fantastic. The team was professional, courteous, and paid attention to every detail. I highly recommend them.

David L. Gutter Installation
“

My downspout was detached after a heavy rain. RainDogs Gutters came out and reattached it quickly and efficiently. They were friendly and professional, and the price was reasonable.

Jessica P. Downspout Repair
“

RainDogs Gutters saved the day. After a particularly bad thunderstorm, a tree limb fell and ripped a section of gutter completely off my house. They responded quickly, secured the area, and scheduled a full replacement. I really appreciate their fast response and professionalism.

Michael S. Emergency Gutter Services

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does gutter installation take?
The installation time varies depending on the size and complexity of your home, but most projects are completed within one to two days.
What type of gutters are best for Louisville's climate?
Aluminum gutters are a popular choice due to their durability and resistance to rust. Copper gutters offer a more premium look and are highly durable, but come at a higher cost.
Do you offer warranties on your gutter installations?
Yes, we offer comprehensive warranties on both materials and workmanship to ensure your peace of mind.
